description: This file contains a stub implementation of the SmsProvider interface for sending SMS messages. It is designed for testing or development environments where actual SMS sending is disabled. The class primarily logs the message details instead of sending real SMS.

classes.name: StubSmsProvider
classes.description: A stub implementation of SmsProvider that logs SMS details instead of sending messages. Useful for development or CI environments.

methods.name: StubSmsProvider
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the provider with notification properties.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Logs the SMS message details without actually sending an SMS.
